scenario: They text 'you up?' at 2 AM, but they also bring snacks and remember your exact coffee order.
Their Instagram is entirely food photos. No people, no selfies. Just meticulously photographed meals going back six years.
They cancel every third date, but the reasons are increasingly creative and honestly kind of impressive.
They say 'I'm fine' but their left eye twitches once every time they say it.
They still have their ex's Netflix password but 'just use it for documentaries, nothing weird.'
Their apartment has exactly one chair, a gaming setup worth five thousand dollars, and nothing in the fridge except hot sauce and a single sad lemon.
They reply to your texts within four seconds every single time. At any hour. On any day.
They ask thoughtful questions, remember small details from three months ago, and also have a binder.
They waved back at someone who wasn't waving at them and immediately pivoted into pretending they were stretching.
They describe their last relationship as 'fine, actually, I just needed space to evolve' and will not elaborate.
They show up to every party exactly one hour late but somehow always arrive at the exact right moment.
They have never once in their life cooked a meal, but they know every delivery driver by name and leave five-star reviews for all of them.
On the first date they confess they have a spreadsheet tracking all the people they've dated, including categories and ratings. They offer to show you.
They call you by a nickname you did not agree to but somehow it's the perfect nickname and now you can't go back.
They argue that they are actually a great listener, and they say this while interrupting you.
They are the last person to leave every party and the first person to volunteer to help clean up, but also somehow broke a lamp before midnight.
They have a second phone just for 'business' and when asked what business, they smile and say 'we don't need to get into that right now.'
They immediately introduce you to their entire family at dinner, having never mentioned you were coming. The family seems unsurprised.
Their flirting style is exclusively making extremely specific observations about you that are somehow all accurate.
They fell asleep at the most dramatic point in a movie you were watching together and woke up insisting they were just 'resting their eyes and absolutely paying attention.'
They apologize constantly but it's always for things that are not even slightly their fault, and never for the actual things.
They are a morning person who insists on starting conversations before 7 AM and considers this a charming quality about themselves.
They have never in their life sent a voice note and don't understand why anyone would. Their texts are always exactly three words.
They arrive at the party having already eaten, and spend three hours insisting they're 'not really hungry' while slowly eating everything.
They describe their ideal date as 'something low key, no fuss, just vibes,' and then plan the most elaborately coordinated evening you have ever experienced.
